mandate: Audits for backward compatibility of proto changes and correct usage of LITE_RUNTIME in remoting/proto/.

checklist.lite_runtime_usage: Verify that `option optimize_for = LITE_RUNTIME;` is used for all remoting protos to minimize code size.
checklist.no_lite_debug_string: Remember that LITE_RUNTIME protos do not support `DebugString()`. Use custom formatters.
checklist.backward_compatibility: Ensure field numbers are not reused or changed in a way that breaks compatibility.
